/cwe/weakness/326.Name: Inadequate Encryption Strength
/cwe/weakness/326.Description: The product stores or transmits sensitive data using an encryption scheme that is theoretically sound, but is not strong enough for the level of protection required.
/cwe/weakness/326.ExtendedDescription: A weak encryption scheme can be subjected to brute force attacks that have a reasonable chance of succeeding using current attack methods and resources.

ModesOfIntroduction.Note: COMMISSION: This weakness refers to an incorrect design related to an architectural security tactic.

CommonConsequences.Note: An attacker may be able to decrypt the data using brute force attacks.

PotentialMitigations.Description: Use an encryption scheme that is currently considered to be strong by experts in the field.
